description: This online course introduces the concept of decentralization in finance, focusing on DeFi (Decentralized Finance) and its applications. It covers the basics of DeFi, the transition from centralized to decentralized systems, and the significance of smart contracts and DAOs.
topic_summary: The course outlines the evolution of DeFi from Bitcoin to Ethereum, highlighting key milestones and applications such as lending platforms, decentralized exchanges, and stablecoins. It emphasizes the benefits of accessibility and financial inclusivity in DeFi compared to traditional finance [t=0:08].
